name: sigmod-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM SIGMOD research papers under the PACMMOD journal-first model: round selection, CMT submission checks, author feedback, revision letters, PACMMOD camera-ready, the Availability & Reproducibility Initiative (ARI), supplementary evidence, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the SIGMOD 2027 CFP, PACMMOD author guidelines, and reproducibility.sigmod.org, checked on 2026-07-08.
